content: IViewLocationExpander (Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Razor) requires two methods. PopulateValues(ViewLocationExpanderContext context) runs first and populates context.Values dictionary entries that form the cache key — if all values are identical to the last call, ExpandViewLocations is skipped and the cached paths are reused. ExpandViewLocations(ViewLocationExpanderContext context, IEnumerable<string> viewLocations) runs on cache miss and returns an IEnumerable<string> of paths in priority order using yield return. Registration: services.Configure<RazorViewEngineOptions>(options => options.ViewLocationExpanders.Add(new MyExpander())); — placed in Program.cs before var app = builder.Build(). ViewLocationExpanderContext.ActionContext gives access to ActionContext, from which context.ActionContext.HttpContext is reachable. Default view location format patterns: /Views/{1}/{0}.cshtml and /Views/Shared/{0}.cshtml where {0}=action, {1}=controller.
